productDisplayName: Jockey 24 x 7 Men Grey Melange Lounge Shorts 9426
description: Style Note Give your relaxation wardrobe a fashionable edge with these knit Sports shorts from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortless Product Details Grey shorts, has a soft elasticated waistband with a drawstring tie, tagless comfort, two insert pockets in front on the sides below the waistband, black tape detail on the sides, brand tag on the right side above the hemline and embroidered detail on the left side above the hemline Material and Care Cotton Rich Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size L
